## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New language
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Matched the surrounding code style; no unrelated reformatting
- [ ] (New language) added a case to `test/languages.test.ts`
